feat.name: Fierce Grasp
feat.requirement: You have an opponent grabbed or restrained.
feat.text: Once you get your hands on someone, it's hard for them to get away. Your opponent takes a –2 circumstance penalty to their next attempt to Escape from being grabbed or restrained by you, and you gain a +1 circumstance bonus to your AC against any attacks they make against you while you have them grabbed.

traits.name: Awakened Animal
traits.text: Awakened animals were once normal creatures before they gained sapience.
